Gee. The hearings will probably
be resumed in Cleveland, O.

pages.raw_text:
Gee. The hearings will probably
be resumed in Cleveland, O.


A summing up of the evidence
taken in Spokane will show that
the government land office, II It is
prone to make trouble for the
claimants, can defeat the issuance
of the patents or delay the matter
indefinitely. The evidence Of joint
development and action In the mat
ter shows that IL there was no un-
derstanding or collision there ex-
listed some sort Of partnership ar
rangement by which all of the de-
velopment work and other expense
were paid out of a common fund.


The entrymen, however, swear
that prior to receiving their GER
tificates Of payment from the gov
eminent that they had no under
standing or agreement of any kind
and that whatever developed in the
way of negotiations looking to joint
action was after that date, which is
permissible. 1t is believed that the
land office will give the entrymen
the benfit of the doubt and that on
this broad assumption a majority
